'''foradaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:elasticotactic|elasticotactic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-r-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:elasticotactic|elasticotactic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| foradaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:foradithi|foradithi]] || [[word:foradiji|foradiji]] || [[word:foradishi|foradishi]] || [[word:foradiki|foradiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:foraduthuthu|foraduthuthu]] || [[word:foradujuju|foradujuju]] || [[word:foradushushu|foradushushu]] || [[word:foradukuku|foradukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:foraduthu|foraduthu]] || [[word:foraduju|foraduju]] || [[word:foradushu|foradushu]] || [[word:foraduku|foraduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:foradufthuf|foradufthuf]] || [[word:foradufjuf|foradufjuf]] || [[word:foradufshuf|foradufshuf]] || [[word:foradufkuf|foradufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:foradethe|foradethe]] || [[word:foradeje|foradeje]] || [[word:foradeshe|foradeshe]] || [[word:foradeke|foradeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:foradothotho|foradothotho]] || [[word:foradojojo|foradojojo]] || [[word:foradoshosho|foradoshosho]] || [[word:foradokoko|foradokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:foradotho|foradotho]] || [[word:foradojo|foradojo]] || [[word:foradosho|foradosho]] || [[word:foradoko|foradoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:foradofthof|foradofthof]] || [[word:foradofjof|foradofjof]] || [[word:foradofshof|foradofshof]] || [[word:foradofkof|foradofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:foradÃŸfthÃŸf|foradÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:foradÃŸfjÃŸf|foradÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:foradÃŸfshÃŸf|foradÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:foradÃŸfkÃŸf|foradÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:foradÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|foradÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:foradÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|foradÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:foradÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|foradÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:foradÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|foradÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:foradÃŸfthÃŸf|foradÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:foradÃŸfjÃŸf|foradÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:foradÃŸfshÃŸf|foradÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:foradÃŸfkÃŸf|foradÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:foradÃŸfthÃŸf|foradÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:foradÃŸfjÃŸf|foradÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:foradÃŸfshÃŸf|foradÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:foradÃŸfkÃŸf|foradÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:foradÃḊthÃḊ|foradÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:foradÃḊjÃḊ|foradÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:foradÃḊshÃḊ|foradÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:foradÃḊkÃḊ|foradÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:foradathatha|foradathatha]] || [[word:foradajaja|foradajaja]] || [[word:foradashasha|foradashasha]] || [[word:foradakaka|foradakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:foradatha|foradatha]] || [[word:foradaja|foradaja]] || [[word:foradasha|foradasha]] || [[word:foradaka|foradaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:foradafthaf|foradafthaf]] || [[word:foradafjaf|foradafjaf]] || [[word:foradafshaf|foradafshaf]] || [[word:foradafkaf|foradafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:foradasha|foradasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:foradshÃḋasha|foradshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:foradroasha|foradroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:foradmuasha|foradmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:foradyaasha|foradyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goforadnkshÃḋasha|goforadnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goforadnkroasha|goforadnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goforadnkmuasha|goforadnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goforadnkyaasha|goforadnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:foraradasha|foraradasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:foraradshÃḋasha|foraradshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:foraradroasha|foraradroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:foraradmuasha|foraradmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:foraradyaasha|foraradyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goforaradnkshÃḋasha|goforaradnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goforaradnkroasha|goforaradnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goforaradnkmuasha|goforaradnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goforaradnkyaasha|goforaradnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ferÃḊdasha|ferÃḊdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ferÃḊdshÃḋasha|ferÃḊdshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ferÃḊdroasha|ferÃḊdroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ferÃḊdmuasha|ferÃḊdmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ferÃḊdyaasha|ferÃḊdyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goferÃḊdnkshÃḋasha|goferÃḊdnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goferÃḊdnkroasha|goferÃḊdnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goferÃḊdnkmuasha|goferÃḊdnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goferÃḊdnkyaasha|goferÃḊdnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:forfadasha|forfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:forfadshÃḋasha|forfadshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:forfadroasha|forfadroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:forfadmuasha|forfadmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:forfadyaasha|forfadyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goforfadnkshÃḋasha|goforfadnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goforfadnkroasha|goforfadnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goforfadnkmuasha|goforfadnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goforfadnkyaasha|goforfadnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
